user.title: Create an aggregate Stremio library
user.description: Configure catalogs, default streams, subtitles and two optional profiles: Latin Audio and F1/Sports.

data_description.catalog_manifest_urls: One URL per line. Cinemeta is suggested.
data_description.stream_manifest_urls: One URL per line. Torrentio is suggested.
data_description.subtitle_manifest_urls: OpenSubtitles v3 is suggested; leave empty to disable.
data_description.latin_manifest_urls: Optional. Stream add-on focused on Latin Spanish audio. Plays without subtitles.
data_description.sports_manifest_urls: Optional. Must declare catalogs and streams for F1/sports.
data_description.default_media_player: Chromecast, Android TV or another media_player entity

data.play_ideal_on_select: Play ideal link when selecting an item

data_description.stream_manifest_urls: Default providers for movies and series.
data_description.latin_manifest_urls: Providers used only in Latin Audio; subtitles are disabled.
data_description.sports_manifest_urls: Providers with their own event or channel catalogs.
data_description.subtitle_manifest_urls: One URL per line. Leave empty to disable.
data_description.play_ideal_on_select: Enabled by default. Movies, episodes and events play directly without opening the source list.
data_description.ideal_link_filter: Prefers 1080p, most seeders and, on ties, the smallest file.
data_description.audio_mode: Automatic wraps problematic torrents as H.264/AAC HLS. Direct performs no conversion. Force always transcodes.
data_description.exclude_keywords: Comma separated, for example CAM, TS, HDCAM.
data_description.subtitle_mode: Automatic loads the first preferred language on Google Cast.
data_description.subtitle_languages: ISO codes in priority order, for example spa, eng.
data_description.subtitle_convert_vtt: Downloads, converts and serves WebVTT from Home Assistant.
data_description.subtitle_base_url: LAN URL reachable by Chromecast, for example http://192.168.1.20:8123.
